parameters.text: Booking flow coming next. Send: book P001

=✅ Booking request received!

Service: {{$json.name}} ({{$json.product_id}})
Price: {{$json.price}} {{$json.currency}}
Duration: {{$json.service_duration_minutes}} min

Reply with your preferred date & time (example: 10 Mar, 5pm).

parameters.subject: =={{'Booking Confirmed: ' + $json.booking_id}}
parameters.message:
=={{`Hi ${$json.customer_name || 'Customer'},

Your booking is confirmed.
Booking ID: ${$json.booking_id || ''}
Service/Product: ${$json.product_name || $json.product_id || ''}
Date: ${$json.preferred_date || $json.draft_date || 'Not provided'}
Time: ${$json.preferred_time || $json.draft_time || 'Not provided'}

Thanks.`}}
